race.comment: Former Victorian CAPTIVATE LEGEND (6) is having her first run for the new stable but showed ability when last in work and should find this a touch easier. Revved up for this with two local trials and should be right there when the whips are cracking. UNIQUELY FAMOUS (3) is another first-up but has placed over this track and trip and trust that Waller has him up to the mark. Can play a major role in the outcome. POWER AND WAR (4) has been thereabouts in all three career efforts to date and looks a must for the exotics players. COCCINELLA (2) is on debut but has shown ability at the trials and won't need to be a superstar to be competitive against this lot. Keep very safe from the inside marble. BASSETT'S CHOICE (15) best of the rest.
